full_text:
Liu Jingzong
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Jingzongwas born in Guangling. A regular patient of Hua Tuo during times of peace. Liu Jingzong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
